name: AEO Monitor
description: Daily AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) visibility scorecard for Nomie Wellness
author: clawdbot

runHourUtc.description: Hour (UTC) to run daily. 9am GST = 5 UTC.

logDir.description: Where JSONL detail logs and CSV score history are written.

slackChannelId.description: Slack channel ID to post scorecard (default: #nomie-marketing)

postEvenIfNoKeys.description: If true, posts an error scorecard when no model keys configured.
